NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT PATEL, JASHVANT M. PATEL, HANSABEN PATEL, JAY DOES 1 TO 20,INCLUSIVE
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED.

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED. NOT REPORTED. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY JOHN VANNUCCI IS PRESENT AS WELL AS PLAINTIFF SHERI GALLO. DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY PAUL CALEO IS PRESENT AS WELL AS DEFENDANTS JASHRANT AND HANSEBER PATEL. ALSO PRESENT IS JACKI CREIGHAN ON BEHALF OF THE INSURANCE COMPANY. THE TERMS ARE STATED AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANTS WILL PAY $135000 TO THE PLAINTIFF IN EXCHANGE FOR THE RELEASE OF ALL CLAIMS AND THE DISMISSAL OF THE CASE WITH PREJUDICE. EACH SIDE IS TO BEAR THEIR OWN LEGAL FEES AND COSTS. THE PLAINTIFF IS RESPONSIBLE FOR SATISFYING ALL EXISTING LIENS BOTH MEDICAL AND LEGAL. PLAINTIFF AGREES TO A WAIVER OF CCP 1642. THE DEFENDANT WILL PROVIDE ALL SETTLEMENT FUNDS WITHIN 1 MONTH OF THE PLAINTIFF'S AGREED RELEASE OF CLAIMS. ASSIGNED TO DEPT. 212 ON JUL-18-2006 AT 10:00 AM FOR DISMISSAL PER CRC 225.
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO COMPEL FURTHER ANSWERS TO DEPOSITION QUESTIONS.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE EACH PARTY TO BEAR THEIR OWN COSTS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY DEFENDANT PATEL, JASHVANT M. PATEL, HANSABEN
CRC 225 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-18-2006 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
JURY FEES OF0000000 FOR TRANSACTION FORFEITED
